flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Le Moyne College rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($22.6k → $25.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Le Moyne College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.6k → $40.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Le Moyne College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
